summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FinFusion personal finance app. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads and functions properly with successful navigation and expense management features.

resolved_issues.issue: JSON serialization error due to NaN values in z-score calculation
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Added robust NaN/infinite value handling in anomaly detection

passed_tests: Backend /api/expenses returns list of expenses (78 transactions)
Backend /api/analytics/spending returns total_monthly and by_category data
Backend /api/forecast/lstm returns forecast data with fallback
Backend expense creation and deletion working
Frontend loads at root / without crash
Dashboard components render: spending chart, expenses, budgets, suggestions
Add expense functionality works with form validation
Expense appears in list after creation
